articles.title: Lexington to cut a slew of teachers as town prepares to build $660M high school
articles.description:
Lexington also handed out 160 pink slips to its educators amid a “significant” budget gap.

The post Lexington to cut a slew of teachers as town prepares to build $660M high school appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lexington Public Schools plans to cut 160 teaching positions due to budget constraints.
The town is preparing to build a $660 million high school amid financial challenges.
These layoffs may impact student-to-teacher ratios and educational quality in Lexington.
